conditions: Right-edge closest piling (4 ft) is sharp with clear texture. The 11 ft and 14 ft pilings that should appear farther left are not visible at all; only a faint vertical haze where they might be. Background is uniform water column with no clear structures beyond the closest piling. This corresponds to conditions where only the nearest piling is clearly visible.

Closest 4 ft piling at right edge is sharp with clear texture. The 11 ft piling is visible but somewhat soft, and farther 14–30 ft pilings are not distinctly separated or textured, more merged into background haze. This matches conditions where only the nearest piling is clearly defined beyond short range.

Right-edge closest piling (~4 ft) is sharp with visible structure; farther pilings (11–30 ft markers) are not clearly discernible, mostly off-frame or lost in haze, so reliable range is limited to the near piling only.

Closest 4 ft piling at right edge is clear with texture. The mid-right (~11 ft) piling is visible but hazy, and the 14 ft/30 ft pilings are only barely discernible as broad shadows in the background. No clear view of distant pilings or bottom, so visibility is between 10 and 15 ft; closer to 10 ft since background is very muted.

Closest 4ft and 11ft pilings on right are clear with visible texture; the 14ft/back-left region shows as a hazy silhouette with little detail; no distinct 30ft pilings or bottom features are visible. This matches the 15 ft guideline where the 14ft piling is present but faded.

Sandy bottom is clearly visible and bright. Multiple pilings in the distance (including those around 30 ft) are visible with clear outlines and some texture, though slightly hazier than the 35 ft reference but better than the 25 ft silhouette case. Conditions correspond to approximately 30 ft visibility.

Closest and 11 ft pilings on right are sharp with clear texture; mid-left (~14 ft) piling is visible but somewhat hazy; far 30 ft pilings are not distinctly visible as separate structures, just a broad blue column with no clear silhouette. This matches conditions where the 14 ft piling is hazy and farther pilings are essentially lost.
